title: malaxis retusa
intro: Malaxis retusa, also known as the "Erect Malaxis" or "Erect Yellow Fringed Orchid," is a type of terrestrial orchid species found in various parts of the world. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Malaxis retusa include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as cough and bronchitis. In herbal preparations, Malaxis retusa is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
